instruction: The GitLab logo is cropped, recolored, and has a ghost copy behind it. Return it to one complete neutral outline.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 92 92" width="92" height="92">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="92" height="92" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/gitlab.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #f97316" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M22.65 14.39L12 22.13 1.35 14.39a.84.84 0 0 1-.3-.94l1.22-3.78 2.44-7.51A.42.42 0 0 1 4.82 2a.43.43 0 0 1 .58 0 .42.42 0 0 1 .11.18l2.44 7.49h8.1l2.44-7.51A.42.42 0 0 1 18.6 2a.43.43 0 0 1 .58 0 .42.42 0 0 1 .11.18l2.44 7.51L23 13.45a.84.84 0 0 1-.35.94z"/></g>
  <g id="icon-dup" data-source="feather/gitlab.svg" transform="translate(18, 16) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #f97316" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M22.65 14.39L12 22.13 1.35 14.39a.84.84 0 0 1-.3-.94l1.22-3.78 2.44-7.51A.42.42 0 0 1 4.82 2a.43.43 0 0 1 .58 0 .42.42 0 0 1 .11.18l2.44 7.49h8.1l2.44-7.51A.42.42 0 0 1 18.6 2a.43.43 0 0 1 .58 0 .42.42 0 0 1 .11.18l2.44 7.51L23 13.45a.84.84 0 0 1-.35.94z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/gitlab.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M22.65 14.39L12 22.13 1.35 14.39a.84.84 0 0 1-.3-.94l1.22-3.78 2.44-7.51A.42.42 0 0 1 4.82 2a.43.43 0 0 1 .58 0 .42.42 0 0 1 .11.18l2.44 7.49h8.1l2.44-7.51A.42.42 0 0 1 18.6 2a.43.43 0 0 1 .58 0 .42.42 0 0 1 .11.18l2.44 7.51L23 13.45a.84.84 0 0 1-.35.94z"/></g>
